input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.2
            TITLE: dynamic area limitations

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.2: Dynamic Area Limitations
D.3.2 Dynamic Area Limitations 
Refer to the Event Website for specific information

RULE: d.3.2.3
            TITLE: the organizer may establish requirements for persons in the dynamic area, such as closed toe

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.2.3: The organizer may establish requirements for persons in the Dynamic Area, such as closed toe
D.3.2.3 The organizer may establish requirements for persons in the Dynamic Area, such as closed toe 
shoes or long pants.

RULE: d.3.2.1
            TITLE: the organizer may specify restrictions for the dynamic area.  these could include limiting the

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.2.1: The organizer may specify restrictions for the Dynamic Area.  These could include limiting the
D.3.2.1 The organizer may specify restrictions for the Dynamic Area.  These could include limiting the 
number of team members and what may be brought into the area.

RULE: d.3.2.2
            TITLE: the organizer may specify additional restrictions for the staging area.  these could include

            CONTENT:

D.3.2.2 The organizer may specify additional restrictions for the Staging Area.  These could include 
limiting the number of team members and what may be brought into the area.

final_answer: D.3.2 Dynamic Area Limitations Refer to the Event Website for specific information
